response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack development and some exposure to the financial sector, he severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ experience. His brief stint using C++ in 2014-2015 and his focus on web technologies, Node.js, and DLang make him a poor fit for a senior C++ Capital Markets role.
strengths: Over 10 years of diverse software engineering experience across multiple technology stacks.
Some financial domain exposure through his work at RIDE Capital.
Demonstrated knowledge of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and scripting languages.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience (only ~7 months in 2014-2015).
Missing strong SQL Server or Oracle experience, focusing instead on MongoDB and MySQL.
Lacks deep Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income domain expertise.
